sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23864" key="deka/pleuros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δεκᾰ´-πλευρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n23864.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ten-sided,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg011:p.422" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Euc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.422</biblScope> </bibl> F.</sense> </entryFree>
